title: Vulcan Materials Company is ‘ideal for an inflationary environment'
text: The Materials Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLB) is down more than 10% since last Tuesday, which, as per Rose Advisors' Patrick Fruzzetti, is an opportunity to position your portfolio for long-term returns. Fruzzetti likes Vulcan Materials Company One name, in particular, that he likes within “materials” is the Birmingham-headquartered Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE: VMC).
